name: pdpp-reference-implementation
description: Forkable PDPP reference implementation with AS/RS, runtime, CLI, and conformance-style tests.

scripts.//dev: Investigation in progress: reference server crashes under concurrent dashboard load with SIGSEGV inside V8's scavenger during native-addon TEXT marshaling. Reproducible with sqlite3@5.1.7 AND better-sqlite3@12.9. --no-parallel-scavenge masks it in short tests but not confirmed as the root cause. --watch is off because its SIGTERM cycle masked the diagnosis. --trace-gc --trace-gc-verbose are on to capture the pre-crash GC pattern next time; remove once the root cause is in hand.
